title: Structured Outputs
code:
import numpy as np

def apply_logit_bias(logits, allowed_indices, bias_value=100.0):
    adjusted = logits.copy()
    mask = np.ones_like(logits, dtype=bool)
    mask[allowed_indices] = False
    adjusted[mask] -= bias_value
    return adjusted

def run_practice():
    logits = np.array([1.0, 2.0, 3.0])
    adjusted = apply_logit_bias(logits, [2], 10.0)
    assert adjusted[0] == -9.0
    assert adjusted[2] == 3.0
    print('[PASS] Logit bias adjustment math validated.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
